style_effects: Intense molten lava glow radiates from Squirtle's shell cracks, casting flickering amber light across the scene. Ember sparks drift upward in lazy spirals while crackling energy aura pulses in crimson waves, surrounded by heat shimmer distortions. Warm, vibrant firelight illuminates the air with a golden-orange hue, creating dynamic shadows that dance with every movement. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
